faq.question: <p>Can I order a clear strip curtain on a portable mount system so it can be easily removed?</p>
faq.answer: <p>We&nbsp;can mount the curtain to a load lock bar system or we can install the curtain system with the portable left and right brackets to easily remove.</p>

faq.question: <p>What information do I need in order to place an order for a custom Strip door curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>In order for&nbsp;us to manufacture a strip door curtain we need to know the type of door that you require to be covered.</p>

faq.question: <p>What information do you need for a rear swing-out door curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Measure wall to wall for the width, and floor to ceiling for the height.</p>

faq.question: <p>What information do you need for a rear roll up door curtain?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Measure from wall to wall for the width, measure just under the door as it is rolled up in the ceiling to the floor.</p>

faq.question: <p>What size material is most common for a rear and side door applications?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The 8 inch (80 ml) is most common for the rear doors and the 6 inch (60 ml) for the side door application.</p>

faq.question: <p>What size clear strip material is available?</p>
faq.answer: <p>6 inch (60 ml), 8 inch (80 ml) and 12 inch (120 ml)</p>
